name: Bid Wall Absorption (Reboot)
hypothesis: A strong bid-side imbalance (high obi_1) that absorbs significant seller-initiated trade flow (negative trade_imbalance_signed z-score) predicts an upward price move. The previous attempt failed by being too restrictive. This version removes the spread filter and slightly loosens the core signal thresholds to generate a viable number of trades.
mutation_note: Responding to feedback `loosen_threshold` on a spec with 0 trades. Removed the overly restrictive `spread_bps` filter and slightly relaxed the core thresholds (obi_1 > 0.95 -> 0.9, zscore < -3.0 -> -2.5) to generate a testable sample.
